high_temperature: Check coolant levels and cooling system integrity.
Inspect the heat exchanger for debris or clogs.
Monitor exhaust gas temperatures (EGT) for abnormal patterns.
high_vibration: Inspect turbine blades for signs of wear or damage.
Verify structural integrity of the mounting assembly.
Perform dynamic balancing of the rotor system.
low_oil_pressure: Check oil level in the main reservoir.
Inspect oil pump and filtration system for blockages.
Check for external oil leaks in the feed lines.
sensor_failure: Verify sensor power supply and wiring.
Replace faulty sensors with calibrated units.
Check the Data Acquisition System (DAQ) for signal processing errors.
